publishedAbstract: - The infra nodes (where the gluster pods are running) are frequently observing iscsi negotiation failure messages in `/var/log/messages` ~~~ Oct 16 15:27:21 infra-02 kernel: Unable to locate Target IQN: iqn.2016-12.org.gluster-block:aaaabbbb-cccc-dddd-cccc-ddddeeeeffff in Storage Node Oct 16 15:27:21 infra-02 kernel: iSCSI Login negotiation failed. ~~~- Even after deleting pv backed by gluster block volume, we are seeing iscsi login being initiated for some target IQN.
publishedTitle: Why iscsi login negotiation failed messages flooding /var/log/messages in OCS 3.11 ?
